mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, trace_id, module_code, operation_type, operation_name, operator_id, operator_name, request_method, request_path, request_ip, user_agent, result_status, error_code, error_message, duration_ms, operated_at, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from sys_oper_log
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from sys_oper_log
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_oper_log (id, tenant_id, trace_id, module_code, operation_type, operation_name, operator_id, operator_name, request_method, request_path, request_ip, user_agent, result_status, error_code, error_message, duration_ms, operated_at, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, request_params, response_summary) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{traceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{moduleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{durationMs,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestParams,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{responseSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into sys_oper_log
id,
tenant_id,
trace_id,
module_code,
operation_type,
operation_name,
operator_id,
operator_name,
request_method,
request_path,
request_ip,
user_agent,
result_status,
error_code,
error_message,
duration_ms,
operated_at,
create_time,
update_time,
create_by,
update_by,
request_params,
response_summary,

mapper.update:
update sys_oper_log
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
trace_id = #{record.traceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
module_code = #{record.moduleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operation_type = #{record.operationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operation_name = #{record.operationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
operator_id = #{record.operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
operator_name = #{record.operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_method = #{record.requestMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_path = #{record.requestPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_ip = #{record.requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{record.userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
result_status = #{record.resultStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_code = #{record.errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_message = #{record.errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duration_ms = #{record.durationMs,jdbcType=BIGINT},
operated_at = #{record.operatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
request_params = #{record.requestParams,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
response_summary = #{record.responseSummary,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

trace_id = #{traceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

operation_name = #{operationName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

request_ip = #{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
